get.description: Get a list of repository commits in a project.

post.summary: Create a commit with multiple files and actions

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID or URL-encoded path of the project

parameters.name: body

branch.description: Name of the branch to commit into. To create a new branch, also provide either start_branch or start_sha, and optionally start_project.

start_branch.description: Name of the branch to start the new branch from

start_sha.description: SHA of the commit to start the new branch from

start_project.description: The project ID or URL-encoded path of the project to start the new branch from. Defaults to the value of id.

action.description: The action to perform. Must be one of: 'create' (create a new file), 'delete' (delete an existing file), 'move' (move/rename a file), 'update' (update the content of an existing file), 'chmod' (change file permissions).

file_path.description: Full path to the file including its extension, e.g. 'LICENSE.txt' or 'src/main.py'. For 'update', 'delete', or 'move' actions, this must exactly match the existing filename in the repository.

previous_path.description: Original file path. Only required for 'move' action.

content.description: File content. Required for 'create' and 'update' actions.

encoding.description: Encoding of the content. Either 'text' (default) or 'base64'.

last_commit_id.description: Last known file commit ID. Optional for 'update', 'move', and 'delete' actions.

execute_filemode.description: When true sets the file as executable. Only used for 'chmod' action.

actions[].description: An array of action objects to commit as a batch. Each object must have 'action' (one of: create, delete, move, update, chmod) and 'file_path'. Use 'update' when the file already exists, 'create' when it does not.

author_email.description: Specify the commit author's email address

stats.description: Include commit stats. Default is true

force.description: When true overwrites the target branch with a new commit based on the start_branch or start_sha

parameters.description: Commit payload with branch, message, and file actions

parameters.description: If the parameter is included as true, the response includes "size". This is the deduplicated size of all images within the repository. Deduplication eliminates extra copies of identical data. For example, if you upload the same image twice, the Container Registry stores only one copy. This field is only available on GitLab.com for repositories created after 2021-11-04.

parameters.name: approved_by_ids
parameters.description: Returns merge requests which have been approved by all the users with the given id. Maximum of 5. None returns merge requests with no approvals. Any returns merge requests with an approval.

parameters.name: approver_ids
parameters.description: Returns merge requests which have specified all the users with the given id as individual approvers. None returns merge requests without approvers. Any returns merge requests with an approver.

parameters.name: assignee_id
parameters.description: Returns merge requests assigned to the given user id. None returns unassigned merge requests. Any returns merge requests with an assignee.

parameters.name: author_id
parameters.description: Returns merge requests created by the given user id. Mutually exclusive with author_username. Combine with scope=all or scope=assigned_to_me.

parameters.name: author_username
parameters.description: Returns merge requests created by the given username. Mutually exclusive with author_id.

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Returns merge requests created on or after the given time. Expected in ISO 8601 format (2019-03-15T08:00:00Z).

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Returns merge requests created on or before the given time. Expected in ISO 8601 format (2019-03-15T08:00:00Z).

parameters.name: deployed_after
parameters.description: Returns merge requests deployed after the given date/time. Expected in ISO 8601 format (2019-03-15T08:00:00Z).

parameters.name: deployed_before
parameters.description: Returns merge requests deployed before the given date/time. Expected in ISO 8601 format (2019-03-15T08:00:00Z).

parameters.name: environment
parameters.description: Returns merge requests deployed to the given environment.

parameters.name: in
parameters.description: Modify the scope of the search attribute. title, description, or a string joining them with comma. Default is title,description.

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: Returns merge requests matching a comma-separated list of labels. None lists all merge requests with no labels. Any lists all merge requests with at least one label. Predefined names are case-insensitive.

parameters.name: milestone
parameters.description: Returns merge requests for a specific milestone. None returns merge requests with no milestone. Any returns merge requests that have an assigned milestone.

parameters.name: my_reaction_emoji
parameters.description: Returns merge requests reacted by the authenticated user by the given emoji. None returns issues not given a reaction. Any returns issues given at least one reaction.

parameters.name: not
parameters.description: Returns merge requests that do not match the parameters supplied. Accepts: labels, milestone, author_id, author_username, assignee_id, assignee_username, reviewer_id, reviewer_username, my_reaction_emoji. (JSON object)

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Returns requests ordered by created_at, title, or updated_at fields. Default is created_at. Introduced in GitLab 14.8.

parameters.name: reviewer_id
parameters.description: Returns merge requests which have the user as a reviewer with the given user id. None returns merge requests with no reviewers. Any returns merge requests with any reviewer. Mutually exclusive with reviewer_username.

parameters.name: reviewer_username
parameters.description: Returns merge requests which have the user as a reviewer with the given username. None returns merge requests with no reviewers. Any returns merge requests with any reviewer. Mutually exclusive with reviewer_id. Introduced in GitLab 13.8.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Returns merge requests for the given scope: created_by_me, assigned_to_me or all. Defaults to created_by_me.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search merge requests against their title and description.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Returns requests sorted in asc or desc order. Default is desc.

parameters.name: source_branch
parameters.description: Returns merge requests with the given source branch.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Returns all merge requests or just those that are opened, closed, locked, or merged.

parameters.name: target_branch
parameters.description: Returns merge requests with the given target branch.

parameters.name: updated_after
parameters.description: Returns merge requests updated on or after the given time. Expected in ISO 8601 format (2019-03-15T08:00:00Z).

parameters.name: updated_before
parameters.description: Returns merge requests updated on or before the given time. Expected in ISO 8601 format (2019-03-15T08:00:00Z).

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: If simple, returns the iid, URL, title, description, and basic state of merge request.

parameters.name: with_labels_details
parameters.description: If true, response returns more details for each label in labels field: :name, :color, :description, :description_html, :text_color. Default is false.

parameters.name: with_merge_status_recheck
parameters.description: If true, this projection requests (but does not guarantee) that the merge_status field be recalculated asynchronously. Default is false. Introduced in GitLab 13.0.

parameters.name: wip
parameters.description: Filter merge requests against their wip status. yes to return *only* draft merge requests, no to return *non-draft* merge requests.
